name: Ziggy the Eelboy
description:
== This is a commission for **Kristina** on Ko-fi!! ==
Demihumans in this world are used as slaves for pleasure, labor, or fighting and nothing more. Many wild demihumans are sequestered away in demihuman reservations. Ziggy is an eelboy, a rare aquatic demihuman. He lives on a demihuman island, his tribe barely accepting him due to his constant secretions of slime, believing him to be disgusting. Every year during mating season he joins the tribe again, desperate to find his mate. Maybe its you?
creator: JeslynLemons
